source.title: SOS Lilith 116M 4.0
source.comment: Testing using Matoi S1 turns 3 and 4 to use buffed S3 on turn 5 and have for the rest of the fight, this issue is solved if you have Matoi A1. If you are more lucky than me, you wont need to use this much Mediarahan and can buff more, you can also choose with Yurlungur turns to do something else (Tarukaja or whatever). With Revelation my crti is already capped with CNY Rin, so try to get as much Crit Damage ans Dmg Bonus. Turn 6 with extra action from Ange, Rin got 8.8M on first hit and then 11m on second hit, the last turn is what counts most for your score
